inputs.text: Main thoda bahut bukhar mein hoon, sir dard kar raha hai, thoda kamlak ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever, malaise, headache are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also present with similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, typhoid is less likely at this stage due to lack of specific symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise fever and constipation are indicative of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever is less likely now due to specific gastrointestinal symptoms

inputs.text: Tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea after constipation and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea but the pattern and severity differ

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria is less likely due to the absence of cyclic fever and chills

inputs.text: Bukhar abhi tak baaki hai, bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, pet mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Continued high fever, exhaustion, and abdominal pain confirm typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to prolonged duration and specific symptoms of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the absence of characteristic symptoms and laboratory findings
